upgrades.summary: Owner-gated cap setters: policy::set_max_per_tx, policy::set_budget, policy::set_window_budget (additive).

usage.packageId: LATEST published id — use for moveCall targets so new functions are reachable.
usage.originalPackageId: DEFINING id — struct/event types (Vault<T>, AgentPolicy, PolicyOwnerCap, VaultOpened) keep this across upgrades, so object/event type filters MUST use it. Using the latest id in a type filter matches nothing.

superseded.reason: Replaced by a fresh publish (0x8b2412e9, 2026-07-13) — separate lineage, not an upgrade of this one.
